The petitioner states that Seema Kumari was taken into custody at 20:15 on 14 March 2026 under the arrest memo and was not permitted to speak with her family or lawyer until the next afternoon.

The chamber note records that the arrest memo and the first production papers do not reflect the actual detention sequence. The remand sheet contains no endorsement that counsel or free legal aid was offered at the first production on 15 March 2026.

Counsel proposes to rely on the guarantees of personal liberty, legal representation, equal justice, and immediate judicial remedies. The petition bundle will cross-reference the arrest memo extract and the remand sheet extract as the core exhibit chain.
